EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Screening Pack Reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Reminder to proceed your application with Alliance Rural & Remote Health
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
REMINDER: TELL US A BIT MORE ABOUT YOU.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
In order to match you with contracts that plays on your skills and experience, we need a few more details from you. Follow the link below to tell us a bit more about you:
OK, LET'S GET STARTED
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
